name: Calalberche — circular along the banks of the Río Alberche
name_original: Calalberche — circular por la orilla del río Alberche
region_intro: Hiking around Santa Cruz Del Retamar offers varied trails to experience the region's natural beauty. The terrain features pine forests and open landscapes, providing scenic views. The area includes routes along the Río Alberche and through agricultural areas. These trails range from easy to moderate, accommodating different fitness levels. Best hiking trails around Santa Cruz Del Retamar The most popular hiking route is Lazarillo Trail (PR-TO 14), a 10.0 miles (16.0 km) trail that takes 4 hours 30 minutes to complete. This moderate route journeys through pine forests and offers panoramic views. Another top favourite among local hikers is Church of Huecas loop from Fuensalida, a moderate 5.8 miles (9.4 km) path. This trail winds through rural landscapes and provides views of the surrounding countryside. Local hikers also love the Calalberche — circular along the banks of the Río Alberche, a 4.4 miles (7.1 km) trail leading along the banks of the Río Alberche, often completed in about 1 hour 50 minutes. Hiking around Santa Cruz Del Retamar is defined by pine forests, riverbanks, and open rural landscapes. The network offers options for different ability levels, from easy walks to moderate hikes. The routes in Santa Cruz Del Retamar are highly rated by the komoot community with an average score of 4.5 stars from 6 reviews. More than 70 hikers have used komoot to explore Santa Cruz Del Retamar's varied terrain.
region_faq:
Q: How many hiking trails are available in Santa Cruz Del Retamar?
A: There are over 20 hiking routes available in Santa Cruz Del Retamar, offering a variety of experiences for outdoor enthusiasts.

Q: What kind of landscapes can I expect to see while hiking in Santa Cruz Del Retamar?
A: The region features diverse landscapes, including pine forests, open rural areas, and trails along the banks of the Río Alberche. You'll find scenic views and opportunities to immerse yourself in nature.

Q: What is the general difficulty level of hikes in this region?
A: Hiking trails in Santa Cruz Del Retamar range from easy to moderate. There are 12 easy routes and 10 moderate routes, accommodating various fitness levels.

Q: Are there any circular hiking routes in Santa Cruz Del Retamar?
A: Yes, several circular routes are available. For example, the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1350510967/calalberche-circular-along-the-banks-of-the-rio-alberche" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Calalberche — circular along the banks of the Río Alberche&lt;/a&gt; is an easy 7.1 km loop. Another option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/31437001" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Picadas Reservoir – Río Alberche loop from Presa de Picadas&lt;/a&gt;, also an easy 7 km route.

Q: What historical sites or attractions can I visit near the hiking trails?
A: Beyond the trails, you can explore several historical attractions. These include the historic &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5430530" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Escalona Castle Palace&lt;/a&gt;, the ruins of &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5430524" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;San Silvestre Castle&lt;/a&gt;, and &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5430519" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Castillo de la Vela&lt;/a&gt;. For a unique experience, &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/highlight/5300154" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Safari Madrid (El Rincón Estate)&lt;/a&gt; offers a chance to see animals in a semi-wild environment.

Q: Are there any easy hiking options suitable for beginners?
A: Absolutely. Many trails are classified as easy. An example is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1350510967/calalberche-circular-along-the-banks-of-the-rio-alberche" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Calalberche — circular along the banks of the Río Alberche&lt;/a&gt;, which is 7.1 km long and takes about 1 hour 50 minutes. Another easy option is the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/38220736" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Hiking loop from Fuensalida&lt;/a&gt;, a 5.3 km path.

Q: What do other hikers say about the trails in Santa Cruz Del Retamar?
A: The trails in Santa Cruz Del Retamar are highly rated by the komoot community, with an average score of 4.5 stars from 6 reviews. Hikers often praise the varied terrain, from pine forests to riverbanks, and the options available for different ability levels.

Q: Are the hiking trails in Santa Cruz Del Retamar suitable for families with children?
A: Yes, with a good selection of easy routes, many trails are suitable for families. The shorter, less challenging paths, particularly those along the Río Alberche, can be a great option for outings with children.

Q: Can I find trails that follow riverbanks?
A: Yes, the region offers trails that run along riverbanks. The &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1350510967/calalberche-circular-along-the-banks-of-the-rio-alberche" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Calalberche — circular along the banks of the Río Alberche&lt;/a&gt; is a prime example, providing pleasant walks alongside the river.

Q: What is the best time of year to go hiking in Santa Cruz Del Retamar?
A: While specific seasonal data isn't provided, generally, spring and autumn offer the most comfortable temperatures for hiking in central Spain, avoiding the intense heat of summer and potential chill of winter.

Q: Is parking available at the trailheads?
A: While specific parking facilities are not detailed for every trailhead, it is generally advisable to look for designated parking areas near popular starting points or in nearby towns like Santa Cruz Del Retamar itself.

Q: Are there any trails that offer panoramic views?
A: Yes, some routes, such as the &lt;a href="https://www.komoot.com/smarttour/e1018390189/lazarillo-trail-pr-to-14" target="_blank" rel="noopener"&gt;Lazarillo Trail (PR-TO 14)&lt;/a&gt;, are known for journeying through pine forests and offering panoramic views of the surrounding landscape.
tips: The Calalberche urbanization, belonging to Santa Cruz de Retamar, is lucky to be located on the banks of the Alberche River. Take a walk through this beautiful environment, to connect with nature or take a dip on a hot day.
